name: Chess Club
summary:
Relive the fantasy chess, now in VR!

Do you remember playing Battle Chess in your old microcomputer at home? Now you can bring back those feelings with in an immersive VR environment and a set of living pieces with carefully crafted animations.

{"height":720,"type":"video","width":1280}

But you can find more environemts to match your mood! The Escher Dream submerges you in a dreamlike world with impossible spaces. If you want to relax in scenarios more tied to reality, you can also enjoy the calm and...
